text: Did you know ignorance can breed overconfidence? It's called the Dunning Kruger effect. People with low ability often overestimate their skills. But here’s the kicker: it’s not just about intelligence. It’s also about awareness. Studies show that as people gain knowledge, their confidence drops. It’s a paradox. Understanding this nuance helps us recognize our limits and pursue true growth. Want to learn more about your mind? Hit that follow button!
